name: io.github.sekera-radim/impri
title: Impri
description: Impri MCP server — human-in-the-loop approval inbox for AI agents

environmentVariables.name: IMPRI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Impri API key (im_...). Get one at impri.dev or from your self-hosted server's first-run logs.

environmentVariables.name: IMPRI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of a self-hosted Impri server (e.g. http://localhost:8484). Defaults to the hosted cloud.
